title: Fly Me Main 2 and Get it on quest
display_title: Fly Me Main 2 and Get it on quest
wikitext:
[]: "Fly Me" (Main 2) and "Get it on!" quest             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 22, 2006 4:57 pm Feel free to move this if it's best under the off topic category. I was wondering for those of you who know more Japanese than I know what's being said in the in-song dialouges of Fly Me to the Moon Main 2 and Get it On! To kiss a dopplerganger ? Fly Me to the Moon~Main 2: LINK REMOVED Here's what I can make out so far: Rei: Do you love me? Asuka: Hey, do you wanna kiss? Misato: Do you want to become one with me? Do you want to join heart and body? Rei: Who are you? Who are you? Child-Asuka: Are you lonely? Part I can't make out: Asuka: Curelty lies within kindness?? Misato: That is reality?? Rei: Do you love me? Asuka: Do you love me? Misato: Do you love me? Get it On! To Kiss a dopplerganger: LINK REMOVED The only words I can make out in "Get it on!" is when Asuka screams "Anta baka?!" ;

[]:             Quote Post by Bardiel » Wed Aug 23, 2006 4:14 am This is for Get it on! To Kiss a DoppelgÃ¤nger http://www.animelyrics.com/anime/eva/ngegion.htm I am currently on a different computer so I can't download the song, so I'll take a look at it when I come home. I jused to have that cd but it went missing

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 23, 2006 12:42 pm If you have Platinum, the lyrics are subtitled in one of the episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 23, 2006 2:03 pm If you have Platinum, the lyrics are subtitled in one of the episodes.
